description: Read-only access to IMAP/POP3 credentials and incomingServer attributes stored in Thunderbird. Used to bootstrap middleware Basic-auth and auto-derive the middleware base URL without re-prompting the user.

functions.name: getImapPassword
functions.description: Try to fetch the saved IMAP/POP3 password for the given WebExtension accountId. Returns the password string on success, or null when the password is not stored, when the account is not IMAP/POP3, or when any error occurs. Never throws and never opens a master-password prompt.

functions.name: getServerInfo
functions.description: Read non-secret incomingServer attributes for the given WebExtension accountId: hostname, port, type (imap/pop3), username, hostnameOrIp. Returns null when the accountId is unknown, when there is no incomingServer, when the type is not imap/pop3, or when any error occurs. Never throws and never opens a master-password prompt. Used to auto-derive `https://${hostname}/sieve-proxy` for middleware co-located with the user's mail server.

functions.name: listLocalFilters
functions.description: Enumerate local Thunderbird message filters (msgFilterRules.dat → nsIMsgFilterList) for the given WebExtension accountId, projecting each nsIMsgFilter into a JSON-serialisable structure (name, enabled, matchAll, searchTerms[], actions[]) suitable for migration into a Sieve combined-script. Resolves targetFolderUri to a server-relative IMAP path (e.g. `INBOX/Logistics`). Returns [] on any error / unknown account / non-IMAP. Never throws and never opens a master-password prompt.

functions.name: deleteLocalFilters
functions.description: Delete local Thunderbird message filters (msgFilterRules.dat → nsIMsgFilterList.removeFilterAt + saveToDefaultFile) by name for the given WebExtension accountId. Used by the Manager «Импорт» dialog after the user opts in to «Удалить локальные после импорта». Matches by case-insensitive filterName. Returns { deleted, errors[] }. Never throws and never opens a master-password prompt; on resolve / list errors returns { deleted:0, errors:[{name:null,msg}] } so the caller can keep the import green.

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: Array of filterName values (as projected by listLocalFilters). Empty → no-op.
